title: gh-pr-create — input
description: Input for `gh pr create` invocation — the most-used GitHub seam. Mirrors the gh CLI surface used by Step 6 (open-release-pr). Per ADR-003 Blue invariant: describes only the load-bearing fields the release-train workflow actually sets.

body.description: PR body — markdown, may be empty but key MUST be present

draft.description: open as draft; defaults to false
